[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../index.md) / service/coffee/domain.spec

# service/coffee/domain.spec

> **Unit Test Layer**

Unit tests for the [CoffeeDomainLive](../domain/variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md) layer composition.

## Remarks

Each test creates an isolated [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) from
[CoffeeDomainLive](../domain/variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md), exercises one of the domain services
([GetCoffeesService](../module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service/classes/GetCoffeesService.md), [GetACoffeeService](../module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service/classes/GetACoffeeService.md)), and disposes
the runtime afterward.  This validates that the layer composes
correctly — all service tags are satisfied and the underlying
`InMemoryCoffeeRepository` is wired through.
